mapper.sql: EXPECTATION_ID, EXPECTATION_NAME, DESCRIPTION, TARGET_DB_TYPE, QUERY_TEXT, EXPECTED_VALUE_TYPE, EXPECTED_OPERATOR, EXPECTED_VALUE, ENABLED_YN, SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN, CRON_EXPRESSION, NOTIFY_ENABLED_YN, NOTIFY_ON_SUCCESS_YN, NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_YN, AI_SQL_REVIEW_STATUS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_SUMMARY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC, EXPECTATION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION ( EXPECTATION_ID, EXPECTATION_NAME, DESCRIPTION, TARGET_DB_TYPE, QUERY_TEXT, EXPECTED_VALUE_TYPE, EXPECTED_OPERATOR, EXPECTED_VALUE, ENABLED_YN, SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN, CRON_EXPRESSION, NOTIFY_ENABLED_YN, NOTIFY_ON_SUCCESS_YN, NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_YN, AI_SQL_REVIEW_STATUS, AI_SQL_REVIEW_SUMMARY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{expectationId}, #{expectationName}, #{description}, #{targetDbType}, #{queryText}, #{expectedValueType}, #{expectedOperator}, #{expectedValue}, #{enabledYn}, #{scheduleEnabledYn}, #{cronExpression}, #{notifyEnabledYn}, #{notifyOnSuccessYn}, #{notifyRecipients}, #{aiSqlReviewYn}, #{aiSqlReviewStatus}, #{aiSqlReviewSummary}, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{updatedBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION SET EXPECTATION_NAME = #{expectationName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, TARGET_DB_TYPE = #{targetDbType}, QUERY_TEXT = #{queryText}, EXPECTED_VALUE_TYPE = #{expectedValueType}, EXPECTED_OPERATOR = #{expectedOperator}, EXPECTED_VALUE = #{expectedValue}, ENABLED_YN = #{enabledYn}, SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN = #{scheduleEnabledYn}, CRON_EXPRESSION = #{cronExpression}, NOTIFY_ENABLED_YN = #{notifyEnabledYn}, NOTIFY_ON_SUCCESS_YN = #{notifyOnSuccessYn}, NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS = #{notifyRecipients}, AI_SQL_REVIEW_YN = #{aiSqlReviewYn}, AI_SQL_REVIEW_STATUS = #{aiSqlReviewStatus}, AI_SQL_REVIEW_SUMMARY = #{aiSqlReviewSummary}, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE EXPECTATION_ID = #{expectationId}
UPDATE BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION SET ENABLED_YN = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE EXPECTATION_ID = #{expectationId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BM_QUERY_EXPECT_RESULT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_RESULT ( RESULT_ID, EXPECTATION_ID, REQUESTED_BY, REQUESTED_AT, STARTED_AT, FINISHED_AT, RESULT_STATUS, ACTUAL_ROW_COUNT, ACTUAL_VALUE, ACTUAL_RESULT_HASH, EXPECTED_VALUE, MISMATCH_SUMMARY, ERROR_MESSAGE ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{expectationId}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedAt}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{resultStatus}, #{actualRowCount}, #{actualValue}, #{actualResultHash}, #{expectedValue}, #{mismatchSummary}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESULT_ID, r.EXPECTATION_ID, e.EXPECTATION_NAME, e.TARGET_DB_TYPE, e.EXPECTED_VALUE_TYPE, e.EXPECTED_OPERATOR, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.ACTUAL_ROW_COUNT, r.ACTUAL_VALUE, r.ACTUAL_RESULT_HASH, r.EXPECTED_VALUE, r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION e ON r.EXPECTATION_ID = e.EXPECTATION_ID WHERE r.RESULT_ID = #{resultId}

SELECT r.RESULT_ID, r.EXPECTATION_ID, e.EXPECTATION_NAME, e.TARGET_DB_TYPE, e.EXPECTED_VALUE_TYPE, e.EXPECTED_OPERATOR, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.ACTUAL_ROW_COUNT, r.ACTUAL_VALUE, r.ACTUAL_RESULT_HASH, r.EXPECTED_VALUE, r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION e ON r.EXPECTATION_ID = e.EXPECTATION_ID WHERE r.EXPECTATION_ID = #{expectationId} ORDER BY r.REQUESTED_AT DESC, r.RESULT_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION WHERE ENABLED_YN = 'Y' AND SCHEDULE_ENABLED_YN = 'Y' AND CRON_EXPRESSION IS NOT NULL ORDER BY EXPECTATION_ID ASC

SELECT r.RESULT_ID, r.EXPECTATION_ID, e.EXPECTATION_NAME, e.TARGET_DB_TYPE, e.EXPECTED_VALUE_TYPE, e.EXPECTED_OPERATOR, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.ACTUAL_ROW_COUNT, r.ACTUAL_VALUE, r.ACTUAL_RESULT_HASH, r.EXPECTED_VALUE, r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION e ON r.EXPECTATION_ID = e.EXPECTATION_ID WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY r.REQUESTED_AT DESC, r.RESULT_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION e ON r.EXPECTATION_ID = e.EXPECTATION_ID WHERE 1 = 1
